profile.hero_bio: Operating at the vector intersections of Embedded System Architecture and automated Agentic AI Workflows.

items.title: 01 // Hardware
items.description: ESP32 microprocessors, sensor array calibration, physical automated relays, and asynchronous packet transfer protocols.

items.title: 02 // Automation
items.description: Autonomous multi-step orchestration workflows configured across Make.com engines paired with structural language parsing frames.

items.title: 03 // Verification
items.description: Precision electronic blueprinting and validation using Cadence Virtuoso terminal environments and LTSpice maps.

sections.heading: Selected Deployments
sections.subheading: Engineering solutions, functional prototypes, and software platforms.

items.title: Safety-Enhanced Stitching Machine Ecosystem
items.description: Engineered a custom hardware safety modification framework utilizing high-speed infrared optical sensor arrays mapped to low-latency microcontroller processing loops. Safely monitors finger coordinates to trigger instant safety stops on industrial needles, removing worker injury hazards completely.

items.title: Personal Website
items.description: This website serves as my digital portfolio, bringing together my academic journey, technical skills, engineering projects, certifications, and achievements in one place. It reflects my passion for technology and my commitment to continuous learning. As I gain more experience, I will continue updating this portfolio with new projects and accomplishments.
